pain_points: Chasing late invoices burns time and hurts client relationships
Complex tools with enterprise jargon and long setup
Anxiety about data security and compliance
goals: Spend more time on billable work
Get paid on time without awkward messages
Stay compliant and in control of data

platform_nuances.LinkedIn: Still casual and warm; slightly tighter structure; avoid heavy slang.
platform_nuances.X: Short, punchy, playful; lead with a hook and a clear benefit.
platform_nuances.Instagram: Conversational and relatable; friendly call to try the free trial.

proof_points: Early users report 20–35% improvement in on-time payments with reminders enabled
Setup to first invoice commonly under 2 minutes
objections: I don’t want to nag clients
Switching tools will slow me down
objection_responses: Reminders are friendly and customizable; they stop automatically when paid
Import clients quickly; first invoice is minutes away
EU servers and GDPR compliance; easy export anytime
